summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 12 SF neighborhood pages redesigned with Precision Craft design system. All pages load correctly with unique neighborhood-specific content, 11 sections per page, and all SEO features working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 SF neighborhood pages fully tested and working. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component and useSchemas hook (not react-helmet-async). Single NeighborhoodPage component renders all 12 data-driven pages from neighborhoodData.js. SF main page at /san-francisco-appliance-repair shows 12 neighborhood links in 'We Serve Every SF Neighborhood' section. URL pattern: /san-francisco/{slug}-appliance-repair

neighborhoods_tested.details: All 12 neighborhood pages load without errors: Sunset District, Richmond District, Mission District, Noe Valley, Castro, Marina, Pacific Heights, Nob Hill, North Beach, SoMa, Bernal Heights, Potrero Hill

hero_section.details: All pages have: dark bg image with overlay, breadcrumb (Home → San Francisco → Neighborhood), eyebrow text, H1 with neighborhood name, sub-text, 2 CTAs (Book Repair Online + Call), trust badges (Licensed CA #51001, Same-Day Available, $60 Diagnostic, 180-Day Warranty)

local_intro_section.details: Each page has 2 paragraphs - template text + unique localIssue from neighborhoodData.js. Content is neighborhood-specific: Sunset (fog/condenser), Mission (warmest/Victorian), Pacific Heights (premium brands), Castro (compact/European), etc.

parking_access_section.details: Dark navy background (#0D1B2A) with card containing car icon and neighborhood-specific parking text. Card has left border accent.

common_calls_section.details: Each page shows 6 numbered cards in 2-column grid. Cards correctly split 'title — body' format using splitCall function. Content is unique per neighborhood.

local_notes_section.details: Cream box (#F8F5F0) with orange top border containing neighborhood-specific notes about housing types, infrastructure, and appliance considerations.

what_we_repair_section.details: 10 service pill links present including stove-repair and garbage-disposal-repair. Links work correctly (verified href attributes).

pricing_section.details: 3 pricing cards: $60 Diagnostic, 180-Day Warranty, $0 Hidden Fees. Additional pricing paragraphs explaining diagnostic, warranty, and OEM parts policy.

faq_accordion.details: 3 FAQ items per page that open/close on click. Questions are neighborhood-specific from quickFaq data. Accordion animation working correctly.

final_cta_section.details: 'Ready to Book in [Neighborhood]?' title with neighborhood name dynamically inserted. Book Online + Call buttons working.

other_neighborhoods_section.details: Shows 11 pills (excluding current neighborhood) + 'All San Francisco →' link. Links correctly point to /san-francisco/{slug}-appliance-repair pattern.

footer_section.details: Links to San Francisco, All Services, Brands, Service Areas. FixitBay logo, phone number, copyright 2026.

floating_button.details: Hidden initially, appears after 300px scroll. Orange background (#FF5722), 'BOOK REPAIR' text, links to /book. Position adjusts on mobile (bottom-72px).

mobile_sticky_bar.details: Visible at viewport < 768px. Fixed at bottom with 3 actions: CALL (tel link), BOOK ONLINE (/book), TEXT US (sms link). Navy background with orange border.

seo_meta_tags.details: All pages have correct title 'Appliance Repair in [Neighborhood] San Francisco | FixitBay LLC', meta description, and canonical URL using custom SEOMetaTags component.

json_ld_schemas.details: Each page generates LocalBusiness and FAQPage schemas via useSchemas hook. LocalBusiness includes FixitBay name, phone, areaServed (neighborhood), rating 4.9/87 reviews. FAQPage contains the 3 FAQ items.

sf_main_page_neighborhood_links.details: SF main page (/san-francisco-appliance-repair) shows 12 neighborhood links in 'We Serve Every SF Neighborhood' section. All links point to correct URLs.

design_tokens.details: CSS variables correctly set: --navy: #0D1B2A, --navy-mid: #1A2F45, --accent: #FF5722, --cream: #F8F5F0. Montserrat font loaded.

unique_content_verification.details: Verified unique content for: Sunset (fog/moisture), Richmond (humidity/Golden Gate Park), Mission (warmest/Victorian), Pacific Heights (Sub-Zero/Wolf/Thermador), Castro (compact/European), Marina (salt air/Bay), SoMa (smart/software/condos), Noe Valley (premium brands), Bernal Heights (hilltop/water pressure), Potrero Hill (sunny microclimate)
